page: Microsoft Azure NC64as_T4_v3 is an x86_64 architecture server belonging to the NCASv3_T4 family, virtualized via Microsoft Hyper-V. It features 64 dedicated vCPUs powered by an AMD processor, paired with 440.0 GB of system memory, yielding approximately 6.88 GB of RAM per core.

The server integrates four T4 GPUs providing a combined 60 GB of GPU VRAM. For local data storage, it includes 2884 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage configurations. It does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

From a resource density perspective, the combination of dedicated AMD CPU cores, multi-GPU acceleration, and large local storage capacity positions this instance for workloads requiring parallel graphics processing and substantial memory footprints. Tradeoffs include the lack of complimentary public IPv4 addresses and the specific allocation of T4 GPUs, which are tailored for inference and light-to-medium parallel computing rather than high-end double-precision floating-point operations. Suitable workloads include GPU-accelerated database operations, machine learning inference, distributed data processing, and rendering.
description: Microsoft Azure NC64as_T4_v3 is an x86_64 architecture server within the NCASv3_T4 family, virtualized via Microsoft Hyper-V. It is equipped with 64 dedicated AMD vCPUs and 440.0 GB of system memory, providing 6.88 GB of RAM per core. The hardware configuration features four T4 GPUs with a total of 60 GB of VRAM, alongside 2884 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability. This server does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses. Designed for resource-intensive parallel processing, the hardware profile is suited for GPU-accelerated databases, machine learning inference, and distributed data processing workloads that benefit from multi-GPU configurations and substantial local storage capacity. The instance offers a balanced ratio of compute cores to GPU accelerators, making it a specialized option within the Azure portfolio for workloads requiring concurrent execution of graphics and compute tasks without relying on high-end double-precision performance.
og_description: Microsoft Azure NC64as_T4_v3 is a Hyper-V virtualized server featuring 64 dedicated AMD vCPUs, 440 GB RAM, four T4 GPUs with 60 GB total VRAM, and 2884 GB of Premium Storage capable local storage.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure NC64as_T4_v3 features 64 dedicated AMD vCPUs, 440 GB RAM, four T4 GPUs with 60 GB VRAM, and 2884 GB of local storage.
tagline: A multi-GPU accelerated server featuring sixty-four dedicated AMD cores, substantial system memory, and high-capacity local storage for parallel computing workloads.
bullet_points: 64 dedicated AMD vCPUs on x86_64 architecture
Four T4 GPUs with 60 GB total VRAM for parallel processing
440.0 GB system memory providing 6.88 GB per core
2884 GB local storage with Premium Storage capability
Zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses included
Engineered for machine learning inference and GPU-accelerated databases
